risk_description: The engine uses public DFAST outputs and does not observe confidential supervisory model inputs.
mitigation: Document the public-data scope and cite Federal Reserve public DFAST sources in the final report.

risk_description: Some large errors are concentrated in specific bank-year-scenario observations, reflecting idiosyncratic bank structures or supervisory adjustments.
mitigation: Report largest errors and bank-level model risk rankings.

risk_description: Tail errors are assessed separately because average performance can hide localized deviations.
mitigation: Use tail error tables and high-risk observation flags.

risk_description: Capital threshold classification is robust at 4.5 percent but should also be monitored around the 7.0 percent reference level.
mitigation: Report threshold sensitivity across a grid of CET1 cutoffs.

risk_description: Model performance can vary across exercise years and supervisory scenarios.
mitigation: Report validation by year and scenario.

risk_description: Credit loss, PPNR and capital depletion errors can interact when translated into CET1 minimum projections.
mitigation: Validate components separately and in integrated form.

risk_description: Vulnerability rankings are relative outputs of the public reduced-form model, not official supervisory assessments.
mitigation: State clearly that rankings are analytical benchmarks.

risk_description: The project is suitable for public benchmarking, educational replication and model-risk discussion, not for official capital planning decisions.
mitigation: Include formal disclaimer in README, report and technical manual.
